title: Mise offers worker output
description: Plutus offer recommendation. Mirrors app/plutus_recommend (run_id, bundle meta, offer/pitch URLs) and adds the SKU/line-item linkage the offer scorecard (ADR 0020) needs to attribute real upsell revenue instead of a project-level proxy. Offers stay PROPOSAL-ONLY: nothing here charges or invoices.

run_id.description: Stable id of this recommendation run.

bundles.description: One idempotent set of proposed bundles per gallery; a retry must not duplicate them.

sku.description: Stable SKU id — the key that links an accepted offer to an invoice line, closing the scorecard attribution gap.

line_items.description: Optional breakdown that maps 1:1 to invoice line items when the operator builds the invoice.
